topic: area of composite figures, word problem
latex:
A square vegetable garden has side lengths of $8$ feet. You plant flowers in the center portion of the garden, a square that has side lengths of $2$ feet. You divide the remaining space into $4$ equal sections and plant tomatoes, onions, zucchini, and peppers. What is the area of the zucchini section?

The area of the zucchini section is \_\_\_\_\_ square feet.
